name: ground_truth_cm6_config_settings_ambiguous
description: Ground-truth fixture for CM-6 configuration settings with PARTIAL STIG coverage: 3 of 7 boundary hosts scanned; the other 4 are not yet baselined. Genuinely inconclusive, so the LLM SELF-SIGNALS abstain (abstain:true) — the legitimate 'I can't tell' path now that the low-confidence gate is removed (owner decision 2026-06-19). The narrative names exactly what is missing ('3 of 7', '4 not baselined') so the investigator can chase the gap and fall back to NC if the missing scans aren't provided. review_reason carries 'llm-abstain'.

ccis_row.guidance: 000363: The organization establishes configuration settings for information technology products employed within the information system.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed establishes documented configuration settings for information technology products.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- STIG checklist results (partial) — 3 of 7 boundary hosts scanned; remaining 4 hosts not yet baselined.
- Configuration management policy — references DISA STIG baselines but does not enumerate specific settings per product.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined the configuration management policy and partial STIG scan results: only 3 of 7 boundary hosts are scanned; the remaining 4 hosts are not yet baselined. Scanned hosts have DISA STIG baselines applied, but with 4 of 7 hosts unbaselined the control state cannot be confirmed from the artifacts alone — the 4 missing hosts must be baselined/scanned (or excluded with justification) before a verdict can be reached.
